en.biology: Transmission of genetic information from parent to offspring.
en.culture: Transmission of beliefs, practices, or knowledge from one generation, or one individual, to another via social learning.
en.technology: Persistence of design features or code structure across successive versions of an artifact or system.

examples: A gene passed from parent to offspring.
A recipe passed down through a family across generations.
A software library's API conventions persisting across major versions.
